event_name: Cloud City Signal Loft Source Conflict Review

confirmed_facts.fact: Venue notes and run-of-show contain different access timing assumptions.
Walkthrough and production notes do not agree on power availability.

unknowns: Which timing source has human-approved priority is not provided.
Whether the rear counter layout can preserve restroom path clearance is not provided.

source_conflicts.claim: Venue notes confirm later access than the run-of-show assumes.
source_conflicts.human_review_need: Human review required before treating access timing as settled.

source_conflicts.claim: Walkthrough notes and production notes disagree on outlet availability.
source_conflicts.human_review_need: Production review required before power assumptions are used.

findings: Human review needed: reconcile access, sound, close, and load-out conflicts.
Human review needed: confirm door, cleanup, beverage support, and cable-safety owners.
Human review needed: confirm access and exit constraints with the venue.
Human review needed: confirm bar placement, quantities, support, and path clearance.
Human review needed: confirm outlet count, cable route, and sound end time.
Human review needed: confirm check-in coverage and arrival wave support.
Human review needed: path width, restroom route, COI language, and safety sufficiency are unresolved.
Human review needed: cost exposure for staffing, rentals, equipment, and extension requests is unresolved.
Human review needed: identify which access source has approved priority.
Human review needed: confirm power and dry bar layout assumptions.

risk_notes: Source conflicts are surfaced for human review and not resolved by this packet.
approval_needs: Human approval required before schedule, venue, compliance, accessibility, safety, budget, public messaging, or source-of-truth decisions.
recommended_next_human_review_step: Operations should review the conflicting source labels with Governance before any schedule or venue commitment.
human_review_required_before: compliance, accessibility, safety, or budget decisions
draft_warning: Synthetic local test packet. Draft for human review only. This packet does not decide which source wins.
